name: railway-tailscale
title: Railway Tailscale Services
description: Browse Railway services reachable over your tailnet through a tailscale-rw subnet router, and open their private URLs.
author: dotlouis

commands.name: browse-services
commands.title: Browse Railway Services
commands.subtitle: Tailscale
commands.description: List Railway services reachable over the tailnet and open their private URLs.

preferences.name: railwayApiToken
preferences.title: Railway API Token
preferences.description: Account (or team) token from railway.com/account/tokens. Used read-only to list projects, services and their private domains.

preferences.name: showUnrouted
preferences.title: Environments
preferences.label: Show environments without a Tailscale router
preferences.description: Also list services in environments where no tailscale-rw subnet router was detected. Their hosts are computed with the default alias suffix but are only reachable once a router is deployed there.
